item.FishBasket_Basic.name: Fish Basket
item.FishBasket_Basic.description: Catches normal-quality fish depending on the body of water. Requires 1 normal-quality fish to craft.
item.FishBasket_Silver.name: Silver Fish Basket
item.FishBasket_Silver.description: Catches normal and silver-quality fish. Less trash. Requires 1 silver-quality fish to craft.
item.FishBasket_Gold.name: Gold Fish Basket
item.FishBasket_Gold.description: Catches normal, silver and gold-quality fish. Even less trash. Requires 1 gold-quality fish to craft.
item.FishBasket_Iridium.name: Iridium Fish Basket
item.FishBasket_Iridium.description: Catches fish of any quality. Barely any trash. Requires 1 iridium-quality fish to craft.
config.locale.name: Language
config.locale.tooltip: Override display language. Reload the save for changes to take effect.
config.requiresBait.name: Requires Bait
config.requiresBait.tooltip: If enabled, fish baskets need bait like crab pots. Default: off.
config.basicJunk.name: Basic Basket
config.silverJunk.name: Silver Basket
config.goldJunk.name: Gold Basket
config.iridiumJunk.name: Iridium Basket
config.junkMultiplier.tooltip: Higher = more trash. 0 = no trash. Default depends on tier (1.0 / 0.75 / 0.5 / 0.25).
